content:
Day 1
MORNING
  • Morning Reading: "In the shade of the house, in the sunshine of the riverbank by the boats, in the shade of the Sal-wood forest, in the shade of the fig tree is where Siddhartha grew up... but Siddhartha himself was not happy... Dreams and restless thoughts came into his mind, flowing from the water of the river, sparkling from the stars of the night, melting from the beams of the sun."
  • Today's Intention: Where in my life do I feel a noble restlessness? I will honor that feeling today without judgment.

Answer: I feel that sitting at home unemployed, crying about my problems and then crying about crying about my problems and lack of achievements and purposelessness definitely causes me to feel restless, as it also impacts people around me like my sister and Kevin and our relationship in a negative way. Today I will go to my job interview at Whole Foods and have confidence in myself, I will keep trying to try and try my hardest today to get a job offer. At the end of today I will begin to feel a small sense of accomplishment as I will have done something different today to end a cycle of suffering.
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 5 (chunk 5/29)
